arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed injury boost ahead of Intercontinental Cup final
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Monday been afforded some altogether timely positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Kylian Mbappé appears to be ahead…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible XI vs. Pachuca: Predicted lineup for Intercontinental Cup final
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how European champions Real Madrid could line up for Wednesday's FIFA Intercontinental Cup final against Mexican outfit Pachuca.

arts.ttl: Who is Jesús Valenzuela Sáez, the referee for Pachuca vs Real Madrid, Intercontinental Cup final?
arts.sum: The final of the FIFA 2024 Intercontinental Cup as Pachuca face Real Madrid will be overseen by experienced Venezuelan referee Jesús Valenzuela Sáez. He has also overseen games in the Saudi Pro League and was recently in charge of the CONMEBOL World Cup qualifying games involving Argentina-Chile in September and Colombia-Chile in October.

arts.ttl: ANOTHER Real Madrid defender tears his ACL
arts.sum: Miguel Perales has become the latest Real Madrid player to suffer ACL damage, according to Spanish media. According to the Spanish outlet, Juvenil A (U19) defender Miguel Perales has torn his anterior cruciate ligament.

arts.ttl: Preview: Real Madrid vs. Pachuca - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's FIFA Intercontinental Cup clash between Real Madrid and Pachuca, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set to be dealt an incoming transfer blow
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid will imminently see their plans on the transfer front dealt something of a blow. That’s according to German football insider Florian Plettenberg, who has on…

arts.ttl: Another Real Madrid youngster suffers torn ACL
arts.sum: The remarkable run of bad luck being endured by La Liga heavyweights Real Madrid when it comes to knee injuries has on Monday continued. This comes amid confirmation that Blancos…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos set to 'complete £83k deal' for defender with 'first-team future'
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly on the verge of signing highly-rated defender Lamini Fati from Leganes in a £83,000 transfer.

arts.ttl: First Real Madrid transfer of 2025 'almost done'
arts.sum: Real Madrid are on the verge of signing Leganes youngster Lamini Fati, according to Spanish media and Fabrizio Romano. The 21-year-old has certainly impressed and is in line for a new and improved contract, but Real Madrid know that this does not fully guard them against any future problems and are determined to bolster their defensive ranks in 2025.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe gives William Saliba verdict after winning French Player of the Year
arts.sum: Shortly after he was crowned French Player of the Year for the 2023/24 campaign last week, Kylian Mbappe insisted that Arsenal centre-back William Saliba would have been another worthy winner. As a champion in 2018, 2019 and last season, Mbappe could have voted for himself but ranked Saliba above any of his other compatriots.
